title: FAIL: MY claim with insufficient sample (n=16, p=0.16)
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture: claims MY significance from only 16 circles (Wikipedia subset). p=0.16 is NOT significant. Demonstrates that small samples lack power to detect the MY quantum — Thom's full 84-circle dataset is needed.

megalithic_yard._note: FAIL: p=0.16 > 0.05. Only 16 circles from Wikipedia. Insufficient power.

fail_ledger.reason: p=0.16 with n=16. Need Thom's full 84-circle dataset for statistical power. Small samples don't have enough resolution to detect the MY quantum.
